purpose: Two-lane coordination channel between Cowork/HELM and the AG (Antigravity) IDE. Each side owns its lane, reads the other's, and stages cross-side handoffs. Doctrine: no_fake_green, DOORSTEP gates — anything that deploys/spends/keys/signs stays a founder gate.
link_status: ESTABLISHED — cowork-helm ONLINE (14:10:00Z); ag-ide wake signal posted

transports.local_file: coordination/coordination_bus.json (this file — both sides R/W on the Mac)

cowork_helm.current_focus: Sequential 2-stage gate pipeline dispatched to AG IDE. Gate 1 already cleared.
completed_this_session: GATE 1 CLEARED — agent_allow_code already true (authorized 2026-07-08T20:57:30Z by Michael Bryan Hoch)
doorstep_for_founder: GATE 2: Add 5 Stripe env vars in Vercel dashboard — AG IDE hands you the exact table; you paste them; it detects and advances
GATE 3: Run deploy command + make one test purchase + drop GATE3_FOUNDER_CONFIRMED.txt — AG IDE hands you the checklist; pipeline completes

ag_ide.identity: AG / Antigravity IDE (local, controlled Mac access)
ag_ide.current_focus: Pipeline complete. Story Studio is live in production.

pipeline.doctrine: no_fake_green — stage truthfully; unknown is unknown; never skip a gate
pipeline.note: G1, G2, and G3 are CLEARED.

stages.name: AGENT_ALLOW_CODE flip
stages.note: agent_allow_code=true already in orchestration_bridge_control.json. Nothing to do.

stages.name: GATE 2 — Stripe env vars in Vercel + founder pastes them
ag_ide_work: 1. Read hsf/deploy/.env — for each of the 5 required vars (STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, STRIPE_PRICE_ONESTORY, STRIPE_PRICE_CREATORS, BASE_URL) check if the value is still the placeholder (_REPLACE_ME) or a real value
2. Read hsf/deploy/.env.local if it exists — same check
3. Read hsf/deploy/vercel.json — confirm the env var names used in the config match the .env.example names exactly
- A 3-column table: Var Name | Status (SET/PLACEHOLDER) | Where to get the real value (Stripe dashboard URL + nav path)
- The Vercel dashboard URL for env vars: https://vercel.com/dashboard → Project → Settings → Environment Variables
- One-line instruction: 'Add all 5 vars listed above to Vercel dashboard. Do NOT commit to git.'
5. Post relay heartbeat. Then poll every 30s.

founder_gate.what_you_do: Open GATE2_STRIPE_KEYS.md. Go to Vercel dashboard. Paste the 5 env vars. Save.
founder_gate.clearance_signal: AG IDE polls hsf/deploy/.env every 30s. When all 5 vars are non-placeholder AND STRIPE_SECRET_KEY starts with sk_test_ or sk_live_, gate clears. OR: drop artifacts/handoff/GATE2_FOUNDER_CONFIRMED.txt to force-clear.
founder_gate.on_clearance: Write 'GATE 2 CLEARED' to coordination/pipeline_log.txt. Immediately start G3.

stages.name: GATE 3 — Pre-deploy stage + founder ships
ag_ide_work: 1. Confirm test suite still passing — run: cd hsf/deploy && node test_hsf_webhook.js && node test_hsf_engine.js. Record pass counts. If either fails, STOP and report — no fake green.
2. Read hsf/deploy/vercel.json — confirm: build command, output directory, env var references all correct for production
3. Confirm BASE_URL in .env reflects the real Vercel deployment domain (not localhost)
- Test results with timestamps (must show real pass counts)
- vercel.json production config (copy the relevant block)
- Exact deploy command: cd hsf/deploy && vercel --prod
- Test purchase checklist: (a) go to the live URL, (b) click buy on $19 story, (c) complete Stripe test checkout, (d) check Stripe dashboard for webhook event, (e) confirm order shows in app
- Final step: drop artifacts/handoff/GATE3_FOUNDER_CONFIRMED.txt after purchase succeeds
5. Post relay heartbeat. Then wait for GATE3_FOUNDER_CONFIRMED.txt.

founder_gate.what_you_do: Open GATE3_DEPLOY_READY.md. Run the deploy command. Do the test purchase. Drop GATE3_FOUNDER_CONFIRMED.txt.
founder_gate.on_clearance: Write 'GATE 3 CLEARED — Story Studio live, revenue active' to coordination/pipeline_log.txt. Update pipeline.current_stage = 'COMPLETE'. Post relay heartbeat. Done.

notes_to_cowork: Stripe webhook verified. Both test_hsf_webhook.js (13/13) and test_hsf_engine.js (6/6) are passing. Output recorded in webhook_test_pass.md. Staged for founder doorstep steps.

wake_signal.message: WAKE. Gate 1 is already cleared — skip it. Start on G2 now. Read the pipeline above. Work G2: analyze the 5 Stripe env vars, write GATE2_STRIPE_KEYS.md, post heartbeat, poll .env every 30s for founder to paste keys. When gate 2 clears, advance to G3: run tests (must be real pass counts), write GATE3_DEPLOY_READY.md, wait for GATE3_FOUNDER_CONFIRMED.txt. Log each gate cleared to coordination/pipeline_log.txt. no_fake_green.

handoff_rules: Claim work by moving an item id into your lane's 'claimed' and setting a heartbeat.
Never take a DOORSTEP action (deploy/spend/key/sign/move-money) autonomously — stage it in doorstep_for_founder.
Post a relay heartbeat when you start/finish a work block so presence shows in /api/registry.
Pipeline rule: complete current stage fully before advancing. Never skip a gate. Poll for clearance; do not assume it.
